reviews.comment:
It was truly a very unpleasant experience dining here.

1. We ordered a coffee latte, island pour-over coffee, Islander Your Way omelette, and K-Spice chicken bites. It took 20 minutes for the coffee to arrive and 43 minutes for the K-Spice chicken bites. FYI, the omelette never arrived, and we eventually decided to cancel that order. The waiter mentioned that the kitchen was busy—is that something customers are supposed to be concerned about?

2. The items that did arrive were far below our expectations. The chicken bites were burnt, and the island pour-over coffee did not match the menu photo (the menu shows it should be served in a glass with a paper filter on top).

3. The dining area was filled with smoke, causing our eyes to sting, and our clothes ended up smelling of smoke as well.

Thank you for the service. However, this unpleasant experience is more than enough for us. We will not be returning at any time in the future.
reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/6119222168702984294/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT204M2FsRkVaak5yVEUwMVprTktaVXRQYlZwbWVVRRAB

reviews.comment:
The atmosphere & location of the cafe is great! Food is good too, however I had terrible experience with the service, my order was taken wrong and then when asked for menu I was handed the bill, later ordered something else too and informed two different servers and waited another 15-20 mins but didn’t get my other order.

The service and staff’s order management can be improved, it’s something that cannot be neglected at such a location. It seems like the staff is untrained.

Would not recommend or come again.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
We appreciate you taking the time to share such detailed feedback. It’s good to know you enjoyed the atmosphere and location, but we hear your concerns regarding the service and order handling during your visit. This is certainly not the experience we aim to deliver.
Your feedback has been noted and shared with the team so we can review the gaps you’ve highlighted and improve how orders and service are managed on the floor.

If you’d be open to it, please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can understand your experience better. We truly value the opportunity to learn and improve from feedback like yours.

reviews.comment: Today, I visited Coffee Island at Churchgate and tried the Java Chip Killer along with the tiramisu—both were excellent. I’d especially like to appreciate one of the staff members, Ritika. She was very pleasant and handled everything smoothly, from taking the order to serving it, and even made sure to note my feedback. Her professionalism and efficiency really stood out. Great experience overall.

reviewReply.comment: Happy to hear the Java Chip Killer and tiramisu hit the mark. It’s great to know the service stood out and added to your visit. Looking forward to hosting you again soon.
